hero.titleLine2: & Agents that work in the real world.
hero.description: From custom AI applications and intelligent automation to hands-on training programs — we help businesses ship production-ready AI, and prepare the next generation to build it.

ctaCard.heading: Have an AI problem to solve?
ctaCard.description: Tell us your use case — we'll scope, build, and deploy the AI application or automation you need, and optionally train your team to own it.

services.heading: What We Build & Deliver
services.description: We are an AI solutions studio and training provider. Whether you need a custom AI application shipped, an automation deployed, or your team upskilled — we cover it end to end.

cards.title: AI Application Development
cards.description: We design and build production-ready AI-powered applications tailored to your business — from internal tools and dashboards to customer-facing AI products.
features: Custom AI apps with modern LLM backends
Full-stack builds with API & data integrations

cards.title: AI Agents & Automation
cards.description: Autonomous AI agents, RPA workflows, and intelligent document pipelines that remove bottlenecks and run reliably at scale.
features: RPA + IDP for invoices, forms, KYC

cards.title: Training, Internships & Co-build
cards.description: Structured learning tracks, mentored internships, and a co-build model where we ship alongside your team while upskilling them.
features: Bootcamps on AI agents, RPA & full-stack AI

product.headline: Introducing AI Revenue Intelligence
product.subheadline: from first call to customer success
product.description: Record every marketing and sales call. Let AI qualify leads, score deals, flag churn risks, and surface expansion opportunities — all in one unified pipeline.

earlyAccess.heading: Be among the first to try it
earlyAccess.body: We're onboarding early design partners. Get full access, shape the product, and lock in founder pricing.
earlyAccess.note: No credit card required · Indian SaaS · GDPR-ready

why.heading: Why AIDT&D?
why.description: We are both a delivery studio and an education lab — real client projects on one side, structured learning paths on the other. That makes us uniquely positioned to build and teach.
benefits: We ship production AI applications, not just prototypes.
Hands-on learning anchored to real project work.
End-to-end: from scoping your idea to deploying it.

forStudents.title: For Students & Early Professionals
forStudents.description: Join our courses and internships to work on real AI & automation projects, build your portfolio, and land your first role in the field.

forTeams.title: For Businesses & Teams
forTeams.description: Hire us to build your AI application, automate a workflow, or run an upskilling program. We work as your AI development partner.
